body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
Wrap the following 3 functions into one function `exchange!`:
- import atmos fields into coupler fields
- import surface fields into coupler fields
- update component models with coupler fields

closes #1320
title: add `exchange!` function

body: `Interfacer.float_type` was used only in one place and can be easily replaced with other functions.
title: Remove Interfacer.float_type

body:
At the very beginning our a simulation, `update_surface_conditions!` should do nothing, because the surface fractions were already initialized at the correct time. This commir removes that call.

This commit also adds a second atmos callback that modifies the cache.
title: Remove unnecessary update_surface_fractions call

body:
`FluxCalculator.turbulent_fluxes!` can now be called in two ways:
```julia
turbulent_fluxes!(coupled_simulation::CoupledSimulation)
turbulent_fluxes!(coupler_fields, model_sims, thermo_params)
```
The previous signature was
```julia
turbulent_fluxes!(model_sims, coupler_fields, boundary_space, thermo_params)
```
The new signature simplifies calling the function, ensures that the mutating convention is respected (`turbulent_fluxes!` mutates `coupler_fields`), and removes unnecessary arguments and type restrictions.

Closes #1295
title: Change signature for `turbulent_fluxes!`
